note: The official Handbook publishes 66 units of Major Courses: 24 units of Business required courses, 24 units of Computer Science required courses, 9 units selected from the explicit Business Applications pool, and 9 units selected from the explicit Analytical Methodologies pool. It also requires both Final Year Project courses for 6 units. COMP3056 is explicitly a required 0-unit internship. The Analytical Methodologies rule additionally permits another COMP course subject to Department approval; this supplement records the 21 explicitly listed options and preserves that open approval rule without treating the list as closed. University Language, General Education and Free Electives are excluded. Courses merely recommended for use of Free Elective units are not included. No Year or Term is assigned because the official requirement table does not specify course timing.
